programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael and Jan try to land a new client by taking him out to Chili's; back in the office, Jim finds a script written by Michael and the workers cannot resist acting it out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Everyone is on edge during performance review, including Michael, who steals the employee suggestion box to get ideas he can present to his boss.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The girls of South Park Elementary challenge the boys to a sledding race, and Cartman gets sentenced to juvenile hall for 13 years.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys start stealing teeth from less fortunate children and selling them to the Tooth Fairy at a premium.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A family of quintuplets takes up residence in South Park and a media circus surrounds their every move.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Timmy is excused from class when he is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder.

programme.desc: A British classmate retells Charles Dickens' "Great Expectations.".

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman seeks mature friends; Kenny tries to prevent the conception of a sibling.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: A haggling Cartman holds the key to saving Kyle, who faces death due to a rare kidney disease and his mother's holistic remedies.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest against the South Park Flag enflames the entire town including the children.

programme.sub-title: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.desc: The boys build a time machine to return to happier school days.

programme.desc: Cartman holds the key to saving the world from an omnipotent super being that springs to life in the school yard.

programme.desc: The 4th grade Thanksgiving play is in trouble and Stan, Kyle and Kenny are going to great lengths to make their production a hit.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: The death of their childhood basketball coach leads to a reunion for some old friends (Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock), who gather at the site of a championship celebration years earlier. Picking up where they left off, the buddies -- with wives and children in tow -- discover why age does not, necessarily, equal maturity.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
